winner.winner_reason: Composite winner score selected this model using CV AP and validation metrics together. Test metrics were not used for model selection to avoid test leakage.

Composite winner score selected this model using CV AP and validation metrics together. Test metrics were not used for model selection to avoid test leakage.

winner_policy.description: Composite winner score using cross-validation AP plus validation-set average precision, recall, balanced accuracy, F1, specificity, ROC AUC, MCC, validation threshold cost penalty, and model size penalty. Test metrics are intentionally excluded from winner selection.
